Reservation.title: Reservation
Reservation.description: A booking for a counseling room at a specific time and date.

roomId.description: The ID of the room (311, 312, 313, 314, glass).

timeSlot.description: The starting hour of the reservation (e.g., 8, 9, 10...).

userName.description: The name of the person who made the reservation.

userId.description: The Firebase Auth UID of the user.

/reservations/{reservationId}.description: Collection of all counseling room reservations.
